title: Bitcoin’s 20% June crash looks even deadlier on the charts. Here’s why
summary: Bitcoin dropped by 20% in June, but the monthly chart reveals something far more concerning.

title: Live markets: U.S. spot bitcoin ETFs had their worst month ever in June, shedding $4.5 billion
summary: The record outflow beat the previous worst month by 29% and came on nine consecutive days of redemptions to close the period.

title: Anthropic restores AI models Fable, Mythos after the U.S. lifts export controls
summary: The government cleared Fable 5 and Mythos 5 on June 30, weeks after a cybersecurity finding triggered an export order that froze access for everyone.

title: XRP holds above $1 after leverage flush as network activity improves
summary: Open interest has collapsed from last year’s highs while active addresses and ETF inflows rise, but XRP still needs to reclaim $1.10 before the chart turns cleaner.

title: Taiwan’s sweeping crypto law raises the bar with licensing, reserve mandates, and tough penalties
summary: Taiwan has passed a sweeping new law to regulate its crypto sector, sending the bill to the President for final approval.
